title: 5.6 Choosing a Convergence Test for a Series

steps.label: Choosing a Convergence Test for a Series
steps.bodyHtml:
If you see...Think...
factorialsRatio Test
n! and exponentials togetherRatio Test
expression raised to the nth power \((f(n))^n\)Root Test inmmediately
\(n^n\)Root Test often
ordinary rational functionsProbably neither
